somali.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Shid makarafoonkaaga oo isku day! Marka aad dhammayso, guji "Dhammee."
somali.available_warm_up_exercises: Layliyada kululaynta ee la heli karo
somali.reset_all_session_data: Dib u deji dhammaan xogta fadhiga
somali.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Laxanka hadalkaaga. Sarraynta codka oo kordheysa = su'aalo, oo hoos u dhacaysa = bayaan, kala duwanaansho = xoojin.
somali.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: Sida aad si degdeg ah ugu hadlayso, erayo daqiiqadii.
somali.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Kuwa si fiican u hadla waxay isticmaalaan joojin! Bar bar 20-30% joojin hadalkaaga.
somali.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Wuxuu falanqeeyaa qaababka joojinta, joogtaynta heerka shibbanaha, iyo joogtaynta codka si loo abuuro dhibco dhaqso-hadal. Duub ugu yaraan 10 ilbiriqsi hadal, ka dibna guji "Falanqee dhaqso-hadalka."
somali.record_more_speech_first: Marka hore duub hadal dheeraad ah...
somali.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Wuxuu muujiyaa codadka shaqalkaaga afar-geesoodka shaqalka ee IPA isagoo isticmaalaya falanqaynta formant (F1/F2). Ku dhawaaq shaqal oo eeg dhibicda oo dhaqaaqaysa si ay u muujiso meesha shaqalkaagu ku dhaco. Habka raadraaca wuxuu muujiyaa isbeddellada diphthong!
somali.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Wareegyada cagaaran = booska shaqalka bartilmaameedka. Dhibic oranji = shaqalkaaga hadda. Raad guduudan = isbeddellada shaqalka dhawaan.
somali.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Duubistu si toos ah ayaa loo kaydiyaa marka aad joojiso makarafoonka. Ku dib u dhig faalada luuqda ee la isku waafajiyay. 3-da duubis ee ugu dambeeya ayaa la hayaa.
somali.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Wali duubis ma jirto. Shid oo jooji makarafoonka si aad u kaydiso duubis.
somali.select_first_recording_to_compare: Dooro duubista koowaad si aad u barbardhigto
somali.select_second_recording_to_compare: Dooro duubista labaad si aad u barbardhigto
somali.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Dooro nooca layliga. Qalabku wuxuu ku siin doonaa weedho aad ku celceliso oo leh jawaab-celin luuqad oo waqtiga dhabta ah.
somali.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Dheh weedhan shucuurta hoose. Eeg sida sarraynta codkaaga iyo codka u beddelmaan!
somali.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Dheh weedha dareenkan. Ka fiirso waxa ku dhaca sarraynta codkaaga!
somali.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Dheh isla erayada bayaan ahaan (sarraynta codka way hoos u dhacaysaa dhammaadka) iyo su'aal ahaan (sarraynta codka way kortaa). Eeg farqiga garaafka sarraynta codka!
somali.statement_pitch_falls: Bayaan (sarraynta codka way hoos u dhacaysaa)
somali.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Isla weedha ayaa micno kala duwan leh iyadoo ku xiran erayga aad xoojiso. Dooro eray hoose, ka dibna dheh weedha adigoo xoojinaya eraygaas.
somali.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Akhri qoraalka hoose xawaaraha bartilmaameedka. Cabbir-xawaaruhu wuxuu ku tusi doonaa sida aad u socoto degdeg ah!
somali.keep_going_hold_your_volume_steady: Sii wad! Hay codkaaga si joogto ah.
somali.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Qaabka sarraynta codka bartilmaameedka (aagga cagaaran = bartilmaameed, oranji = sarraynta codkaaga):
somali.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Dheh weedha hadda! Isku day inaad la mid noqoto aagga cagaaran bartilmaameedka.
somali.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Khubarada daaweynta hadalka waxay isticmaalaan qaabab luuqad gaar ah oo ah bartilmaameedyo caafimaad. Dooro qaab si aad u aragto qaabka sarraynta codka bartilmaameedka oo aad ugu celceliso la midaynta.
somali.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Ku celceli ku dhawaaqidda luqad kasta! AI wuxuu tusaale u samayn doonaa weedha, ka dibna adigu waxaad isku dayaysaa inaad la midayso luuqdiisa.
somali.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Dhageyso moodelka AI oo ku hadlaya weedhan
somali.listen_carefully_to_the_model: Si taxadar leh u dhageyso moodelka...
somali.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Zuunkaaga! Dheh weedha oo isku day inaad la midayso qaabka sarraynta codka.
somali.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Xariiqda jajaban = moodel, xariiqda buuxda = hadalkaaga. Isku day inaad ka dhigto inay la mid noqdaan!
somali.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Garaafka barbardhigga luuqda oo muujinaya qalooca moodelka iyo qalooca hadalkaaga oo is dul saaran
somali.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Kooban fadhigaaga ku celcelinta. La wadaag khabiirkaaga daaweynta hadalka!
somali.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Samee kooban qoraal ah oo fadhigan ah oo aad la wadaagi karto khabiirkaaga daaweynta hadalka.
somali.generate_session_report_for_sharing: Samee warbixinta fadhiga si loo wadaago
somali.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Nadiifi dhammaan xogta fadhiga oo cusub bilow
somali.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Ku noqo liiska qalabka STEM Lab
somali.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Muujinta luuqda hadalka ee ku celcelinta khabiirka hadalka ku taliyay
somali.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Muujiye toos ah — duub oo akhri soo bandhigiddaada
somali.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Raadraaca sarraynta codka waqtiga dhabta ah + cabbir-cod + tirshe-erayo buuxin. Kuwa la tababaray waxay beddelaan sarraynta codka ~30% weedh gudaheed; soo bandhigid siman waxay lumisaa fiirada dhegeystaha gudaha ~20 ilbiriqsi.
somali.practice_work_through_a_delivery: Ku celceli — ka shaqee soo bandhigid
somali.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Bartilmaameedka xawaaraha ~erayo 150/daqiiqad. Joojinta u dhaxaysa fikradaha (1-2 ilbiriqsi) waxay culays le'eg tahay erayada. Marka hore akhri qoraalkaaga cod dheer; jumlado xun ayaa isla markiiba muujiya.
somali.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Luqado badan — isla khudbad, luqado badan
somali.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Heerka hadalku aad buu ugu kala duwan yahay luqadda: Isbaanish + Jabbaan ~shibbano 7/ilbiriqsi; Ingiriis ~6; Mandarin ~5. Heerka macluumaadku waa mid ku dhawaad joogto ah — luqadaha cufan si tartiib ah ayaa loo hadlaa.
somali.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Xawaare, xadka sarraynta codka, cufnaanta erayada buuxinta, waqtiga joojinta — mid kasta waxaa loo qiimeeyaa bartilmaameedyo cilmi-baaris taageertay. Guji cabbir kasta si aad u aragto tixraac + talo tababar.
somali.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Luuqda — ogow sida soo bandhigiddu u qaabeyso macnaha
somali.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Hagaaji beddelka sarraynta codka, xawaaraha, iyo kordhinta codka, ka dibna qor waxa aad ka fiirsato. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto — samee mala-awaalkaaga sababta ay khudbadaha TED intooda badan ugu dhow yihiin erayo 150/daqiiqad.
somali.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Caadi ahaan hadalka badankiisa. Laxan dabiici ah.
somali.too_fast_comprehension_drops: Aad u degdeg ah — fahamku wuu hoos u dhacaa.
somali.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Hagaaji beddelka sarraynta codka, xawaaraha, codka. Kala saarid gaar ah oo 4-xawaare. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto.
somali.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Mala-awaal: Sidee xawaaruhu u saameeyaa fahamka daawadayaasha?
somali.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Khudbadaha TED intooda badan waa ~erayo 150/daqiiqad. Baar sababta.
somali.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Goorma ayay kala duwanaanshaha sarraynta codka caawisaa iyo goorma ay maskaxda kala qaadaan?
somali.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Sharax sida luuqdu u qaabeyso saameynta khudbadaynta.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Xusuus naqshadeed: calaamad gaar ah oo 4-xawaare; dhibco soo bandhigid ma jiraan; muujin ma jirto — si ula kac ah.
somali.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Qalabkan waxaa loo naqshadeeyay sida faragelin fasal Heerka 1. Daaweynta hadalka gaarka ah, fadlan la tasho khabiir hadal shahaado leh.
somali.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Muujintu waxay isticmaalaan ogaanshaha sarraynta codka Web Audio API (isku-xirnaan) iyo falanqaynta ballaca. Dhammaan farsamaynta waxay ku dhacdaa gudaha browserka — cod ma jiro oo la duubo ama la gudbiyo.
